description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style shelving unit featuring three spacious, rectangular shelves supported by a dark metal frame. The shelves themselves appear to be made of wood with a weathered, natural finish, giving the piece a rustic yet urban look. The frame is constructed from thick, angular metal beams, reinforced at the corners with large, visible bolts and cross-bracing on the sides for added stability. The open design allows for easy access from the front and sides, making it suitable for storing or displaying a variety of items. The overall construction suggests durability and the ability to support heavy loads, making it ideal for use in garages, workshops, or urban lofts. There are no doors, drawers, or handles, emphasizing its open, utilitarian function.
description: A sturdy, industrial shelving unit with three wooden shelves and a reinforced metal frame, featuring open sides and cross-bracing for stability.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three wooden shelves and the open, accessible design framed by metal beams.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the metal cross-bracing and the depth of the shelves, with visible bolts at the corners.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the open shelving and structural metal frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the cross-bracing and the layered arrangement of the shelves.
